case_title: HAMILTON, LORELL VS MILENA TALIAN PROPERTY MANAGER et al

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HAMILTON, LORELL AS TO DEFENDANT MILENA TALIAN PROPERTY MANAGER FILLMORE MARKETPLACE LP RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, LORELL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILENA TALIAN PROPERTY MANAGER FILLMORE MARKETPLACE LP RELATED COMPANIES OF CALIFORNIA GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. $290.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $410.00, DEFENDANT MILENA ITALIAN PROPERTY DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS IMPROPERLY NAMED AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLAINTIFF FILES DECLARATION AMENDING CLAIM BY ADDING A NEW DEFENDANT; CHANGING THE AMOUNT OF CLAIM TO $7,500; AND ADDITIONAL ISSUE BEING SUED.
